h5ecb508dgadd1g461cgadbbge1e5dbae0b05: Oh! My, you startled me. I... I was miles away.
h2e50c664gc1ccg476ag9139gd1fdba8406f9: Of course, of course. I was just... practicing an incantation.
hd4d02f1bg82c2g41e9ga818g97e8cc1f0074: There's more to it than that. The figure I saw: she means something to you.
h006d08b7g7803g469egb9f7g76062004aa67: I can't quite describe it, the need I sometimes feel to see her - to draw the filaments of fantasy into existence.
hc829a36bg3799g4414g9160gb089cda8d867: No sculpture or painting could ever do her justice, only the fabric that she herself is and embodies:
hc4e95019g7816g45edgaa62gf91bebc75199: Mystra is all magic. And as far as I'm concerned, she is all creation.
h49371a7egd38ag42f0gaf76ge78310ecf58f: I didn't realise the depth of your devotion.
h6cad0fb1g26a7g4f23g8560g29a07ee77f1a: Magic is... my life. I've been in touch with the Weave for as long as I can remember. There's nothing like it.
ha2193194ga08fg48c2g9ca4g5e75d5b951ea: It's like music, poetry, physical beauty all rolled into one and given expression through the senses.
h29f613c8g813dg4462g9fa2ga1103884d5f0: Would you like to experience this?
h11dabe76g889ag47b3gb07bg3206d8e32309: *A familiar feeling - like a kind word and a kind touch at the same time. It's warm and comfortable.*
h55f83fa3gfdb4g4964gaa87g15edf01c51df: Excellent. Now repeat after me: Ah-Thran Mystra-Ryl Kantrach-Ao.
hb8f3c2bfg827eg4540g8b1bg89b7d0630696: An easy incantation. You simply repeat after Gale.
hb0db02eegc527g4058g92bbg6dc08d7fdf6e: *Ah, yes: the scent of rosewater and a sense of wellbeing. A sliver of Weave that tastes sweet on the tongue.*
h07a6c634g9a37g4f50gacbfgd91000ee702c: Very good. Now I want you to picture in your mind the concept of harmony. As true as you can.
hb24fc3c6g63ccg48d3g844fga362db9d3ab5: Recede into the calm centre of your mind, just like you were taught at the academy.
hf7f25594g2078g4cedg9341g6fbbd1eee36d: *You see (or is it sense?) the unmistakable presence of Mystra, the Lady of Mysteries.*
ha693b6ffg31f6g4e33ga5dfg9bf3340e1e80: *There's something like the anticipation of a kiss, then the pleasure of being cloaked in peace.*
had21b187gb943g4d5fg9e5cg6d9a647bc71c: *You are safe. You are nestled in the cup of Mystra's hand.*
h8b7d6ed0gc177g45cfgb1f6g5980e5997afc: Look at that. We're channelling the Weave. How does it feel?
h3fda792eg64dbg4f93g844age4b440011512: You did it. You're channelling the Weave. How does it feel?
h1266d925g98bcg4bd3ga53cg0b73b68959eb: *The Weave connects you. The moment feels intimate.*
h76295d44g9f67g44d6ga8a0gc957a79e17e2: You hold on to the moment. It's a good night for intimacy.
h3aec17b3g1e76g4e0eg849fgf3f2e02bfaac: *You realise the Weave is making you one. You have but to imagine your desire, and Gale will know it.*
hb0930d60g4669g4003gbb28g09148f8258d9: *You perceive quick-fire gusts of embarrassment, trepidation, and finally... elation.*
hadcf9376g52e1g4e06g943eg79ab131ad3da: Sorry, I wasn't expecting... But it is a pleasant image to be sure!
h4bfb3fc6g68b4g4b2egaacdg5c5a61bc1369: Most pleasant, in fact. Most welcome.
haf1ec0fage4dcg415ag865dg36f9006e020d: *The Weave evaporates, and as it does so, you realise the night feels suddenly cold and lonesome.*
ha15e0724g19e0g43cdg9396g902e47a09fd0: There it goes. How easily things slip away from us, no matter how hard they were in the obtaining.
h8bee5695g3ab5g4e74g899fgd8d9e33c4a97: Goodnight. I enjoyed sharing a moment of magic with you.
hc37ab3e1gf10cg4dfdg9fa5gf7d77b1b10fb: You picture kicking him in the gut.
he687eb67ga389g4d48gb2f1gd35d3e285e28: There it goes. I suppose a blow to the stomach upsets the Weave as much as it would me.
ha66db4b3g9628g4adega714g6c565e6bf220: I'm going to bed. Perhaps this was all a mistake.
h695138ecgf58fg42c8g8868g5d06a6e691e9: You picture his severed head on a spike.
h87817865g350bg47b9g9499g2957044a7bcf: Goods gods, what on earth makes you picture that?
h96031b70ge3b7g42cfg938fg288d9ff6660a: You picture nothing. This is a bad idea.
hab213654g4045g46bag9088g5a4ce0088b82: This feels too intimate. It's time to let slip the Weave.
h3b098e9fg20f0g4a8ag9523g0bc540735833: The same as it always does.
h5b44f3acg7e6fg484fgb08cg56c85d055215: You're hard to please, aren't you?
h21ee9bb4ge136g4e6cgba3bg642e0ef9046a: It's different, but I can definitely feel Mystra's presence.
h9b6e3546g4118g45afgb82ag90d9ea18b956: Quite so. The Weave is a sensitive conduit.
h83ecbd98g9a0dg4cbeg8812g4c84ad043e43: It's different, but I can definitely feel a familiar kind of presence.
h49b8cbdbg02c3g4db6g9c69gcf96638680c2: It feels like a good time to call it a night.
h1dd1c195g0d34g40a3g9ab7g0c74e214351a: *You are safe. You are nestled in the cup of her hand.*
h19da919dgeec5g41e0g88aag42dcc6128867: Picture the perfect darkness - to be in the womb of Shar.
h84a0d6afg96d7g46a1g9f6eg504bab8e84cb: *You see (or is it sense?) the presence of a woman, the woman who hovered over Gale's palm.*
h013a262cg9551g4a4dg9136g75ee3c2eacb6: Recall a memory of early youth, a happy family moment.
he1a1c935g9b3ag49bcg9fecg1d01098eb73e: Picture a place of utter peace, away from all harm and the mayhem of civilisation.
h20d5f5f2g93e9g459dga4b4gee3486a67a77: Think of the here and now: this unexpected moment of learning.
h6f3974c6g711eg4b5fga912gcf546e7baf33: That's too abstract for my tastes. Let's just forget about it, shall we?
h8388a084gdb2bg425eg9cfag6d2cd3568ac1: I think it's a mistake to give up on the brink of success, but I cannot force your hand.
he92541f3g016cg41c4g8517gec3926222f89: You sense power in these words. Speak them deliberately.
h98ed379bg28e3g4f23gb2a7g05c102c7481f: *Suddenly: the scent of rosewater and a sense of wellbeing. A sliver of Weave that tastes sweet on the tongue.*
h66710354g5e01g4418ga196g8a9810df1388: You repeat the words, bold and proud.
hf93eac97gebe9g4e50g8bb3gcc967388ca14: You repeat the words, slowly, but carefully.
hcc990cefg3d02g4beegbb99g0604c6cf6227: Actually, I dislike tongue twisters. Let's just call it a night.
hfc93dff5gda9bg42b2g8bdbgf2196dc578d9: You imitate the gesture with a flourish.
h3ee0e121g1966g49c1g9f9eg7cf5b31bfebc: *You feel something strange - like a kind word and a kind touch at the same time. It's warm and comfortable.*
h958380e4g54bdg47bag9b69g515ac8d9dbb6: Not quite. But this is the easy part. Shall we try again?
hb0302ef7g9fc2g4bb3gbbf2g4a3f3a6d996b: No, I'm sorry, but it looks like magic's not on the cards tonight. Perhaps I'm not quite the teacher I fancy myself to be.
h6edada68g2b56g4e1bgaff7g5e7267796e86: In any case, don't blame yourself. Mystra can be a fickle mistress. As I'm sure you're aware.
he3dca26fg1df7g4223gbbcbg214658a7f5a4: In any case, don't blame yourself. Mystra can be a fickle mistress. Coy to a tee.
h8f60f232ge0bcg40ddg8924g38bf16990f18: No, thanks. Not my cup of tea, clearly.
h2dd8849eg6c33g4d38gbd90gcc71d09b12b4: I think it's a mistake to give up so easily, but I cannot force your hand.
h225c1b91g07ebg4129g8fceg121cf002e2a2: You imitate the gesture quickly and decisively.
h3125fabagf440g4532g8997ga570e6d84ae0: You imitate the gesture slowly and as precisely as you can.
h47d769f3g00e6g4126g9871g898950038dfd: Actually, never mind. Magic is just not for me.
hf4ddb1adg98f8g4b67g8fc1gdc417d00147e: I think it's a mistake to hold that conviction, but I cannot force your hand.
hc0696795g9d01g410egb04ag72f84b8fc33d: Mystra normally answers me through prayer, but I don't mind trying.
h791709b2g02e7g4c75gba20g2957a1241816: Magic normally comes to me through prayer, but I don't mind trying.
h337f0099g1e87g4444ga50cga121fd6d817a: No, I have no interest in such magic.
h40cf0836gacb0g4935g99d7ge47c26b1b2bf: Disinterest is such a disheartening condition.
ha4677b71g9fbdg4650gbaceg604483c514c1: Always a pity when opportunities slip us by.
ha0cda056gb333g4e54ga017g5229b284d179: Is it the same for you?
h50c5bceeg3784g49dcg961ag38e062242460: Perhaps we can share the experience by reaching into the Weave together.
hbbf1039cgd26fg48c8g8d0dg086904e4f64a: It's getting late. Perhaps another time.
h6d83d1efg846cg46afg9d4fg5e5c12c131e6: It's different for me. Not quite so intense.
h118b0f98g52d6g41f4gb633g30cc89d49e08: Perhaps I can show you what I mean by reaching into the Weave together.
h3b700221g0fb8g486agbdfag8dfed2b34829: You wouldn't say that if you felt what I feel.
h39dfe200g4eecg4d94gaf9dga5f6b3af00c0: You sound like a smitten school boy.
h01834900g2ac5g49a7ga0e2g930b80661e9b: It's a kind of love after all.
hc313df06gc095g4cb8g9030ga0736c02f055: I quite agree. There's no greater deity than Mystra.
h469e2714g7bceg4a1fg8b0bgff287640755b: I quite agree. There's no greater deity than Mystra.
h2e7b83fag7ecdg43b1g94b9g4ec4ba5db676: I wouldn't go quite that far myself.
h6fad0584g8747g4c82g925bge5b1097606a9: No, but you do understand, don't you?
h4d04fe91gd700g4bb7g8840g87d9947b0cdc: That's just a lot of delusion speaking.
ha2dbe914g7b82g4283ga39eg39c74376b978: You read too much into it. I was merely indulging in my passion.
h73b72af1g1ae4g4f28gac45g0b981ef49297: I do - because it's through practice that I seek to perfect. To augment.
h3fc7badfg8a08g4d86gaf22g62249a26c6a7: I'll leave you to it then. Good night.
h7abd866ega35dg4e04gbe8dg281c87b6c94f: The figure you conjured: who is she? Someone you miss?
hdebfbe49g44c6g4094g917dg457ac52e1627: No, no. She's no one, really. I was just... practicing an incantation.
hb003c20aga8eeg4589gb489g4bd2f842d463: You don't have that look on your face when you're looking at 'no one'.
h0fef219eg30bcg4859ga66ag5feb85e102a5: What can I say? She's... She's Mystra.
h08330878g80ddg4a7fg8261g2729fc4f86f0: Care to tell me why you were conjuring an image of Mystra?
ha607aa16g728eg41e7g8731g3025fc07a3a8: No reason, really. I was just... practicing an incantation.
hd3eda247g9387g4317g836eg695a451aee04: There's more to it than that. You were contemplating her in a way I can hardly fathom.
h8c5ae224gf481g46eegaa42g2d40b6e4828a: I know that look. You were praying to your goddess, weren't you?
h7474d07dg4487g49fbga6fag02c859970767: Not praying. Not quite. I was just... practicing an incantation.
hacb7b9b3gc7c7g4a5bg96f2gd5f60bc4cc71: No, there's more to it than that. I know devotion when I see it.
hfa9fe820ge510g45b7g856cg5049280809a3: I'm no cleric, like you are. It's different for a wizard.
